notes: The terms text endpoint is /terms/text (note the /text suffix), not /terms.
Body is plain text despite the text/html Content-Type.
Body content is the legal Terms of Service prose; not expected to drift often, but every drift is potentially material so we hash-pin.
Allow-Methods header for this endpoint is 'GET, OPTIONS' — narrower than the 'POST, GET, OPTIONS' on /api/v1 endpoints.
